description: Tests the distinction between type aliases and type definitions, and how fields using them are serialised.

assertions.description: UserID should be marked as an alias.
ProductID should NOT be marked as an alias.
A field using a local alias should preserve the alias in its TypeString.
The local alias field should have the main package path.
A field using a cross-package alias should preserve the alias in its TypeString.
The cross-package alias itself (PublicUser) should be serialised and marked as an alias.
The cross-package alias's TypeString should point to the underlying (but unexported) type.
The ExternalUser field should have the models package path.
